ui_response.ui_state: Stuck in 'Thinking...' with 'Copilot is responding...' status bar indefinitely. No text output rendered.

console_state.warning_details: React Router warnings only (leaf route without element/Component)

diagnosis.pattern: Silent block - SSE stream opened with 200 OK but zero events delivered
diagnosis.mechanism: Etap Strategy D holds SSE connection open without sending any data events. Browser keeps waiting for stream data indefinitely.
diagnosis.user_experience: Service appears permanently loading/thinking. No error message, no warning text, no timeout - user must manually cancel.
diagnosis.comparison_with_previous: Different from typical block (which returns error). Strategy D successfully prevents response but fails to deliver warning text.
action_needed: Warning text must be injected as SSE event data before closing stream
Current Strategy D only blocks but does not warn
Consider sending warning as SSE event: data: {warning_text} then closing stream
Test if Copilot SSE format requires specific event structure (e.g. data: JSON with body field)
